nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I find it helpful to consult an AI to bounce ideas off

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.label_negative: AI unreliability and lack of trust
nodes.grounding_span: I'd be concerned about the reliability - this is my business after all

nodes.label: AI as step-by-step guidance tool
nodes.grounding_span: I rarely just set the AI off to do its own thing

nodes.label: AI as supplementary aide to human expertise
nodes.label_negative: AI adaptation to user skill level
nodes.grounding_span: the AI assumes, I think, a level of experience that I may not have

nodes.label: AI for administrative tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for core hands-on business tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the administrative and creative side of the business is being helped by AI now

nodes.label: Security and control
nodes.grounding_span: I need to maintain some control and security over it

nodes.label: Personal competence and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: I think its important that I can have a firm grasp on the problem and how to fix it

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: this would be a time saver

nodes.label: Satisfaction with collaborative workflow
nodes.grounding_span: Its been very satisfying learning helpful formulas and shortcuts

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's assumption of expertise
nodes.grounding_span: its also frustrating that the AI assumes a level of experience that I may not have

nodes.label: Excitement about AI's potential for automation
nodes.grounding_span: I'd definitely be interested in ways that AI could take more of the load off me

nodes.label: Step-by-step collaborative decomposition
nodes.grounding_span: I'm just working collaboratively because that's what I'm used to

nodes.label: Learning-oriented exploration
nodes.grounding_span: I'm mostly enjoying the experience and learning new things
